outputPolicy: WebM and PNG storyboards may be generated with Playwright locally; normal build/test does not require ffmpeg or video tooling.

demos.title: Find a hexagon
storyboardFrames: Focus an m=3 pair in a compact or finite example.
Read the six alternating boundary labels.

demos.title: Understand a rank-three cell
storyboardFrames: Orbit until square and hexagon faces share a visible edge.

demos.title: Inspect Y_Gamma
storyboardFrames: Show the single base vertex and generator arrows.
Toggle full 2-skeleton and topology glass mode.

demos.title: Run a quotient/game experiment
storyboardFrames: Use the s0=+1, s1=-1 cocycle preset.
Inspect ascending and descending link lenses.
